flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Eastern Gateway Community College are 10% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.1k vs $38.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Eastern Gateway Community College rose 131% between 2006 and 2009 (11.2% → 25.8%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Eastern Gateway Community College are 38% above 6-year earnings ($24.8k → $34.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Eastern Gateway Community College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (1.6k → 1.8k).
